pageContext.name: Premium BTS Logo: Los Angeles Edition
pageContext.description: Sideshow Presents the Premium BTS Logo: Los Angeles Edition, a special edition licensed BTS collectible inspired by California's sprawling, star-studded southern city.  Measuring 7 tall and 4.5 wide, the Premium BTS Logo: Los Angeles Edition takes the iconic shape of the 21st-century pop icons' logo, visualized as a set of doors opening outward to possibility, and incorporates warm, vibrant imagery indicative of Los Angeles. On one side of the statue is the ARMY symbol, right behind the BTS logo, which brings together past and present in a single elegant design.  On the BTS symbol, light peach-colored script spells out Los Angeles as a white airplane flies overhead, outlined by a clear blue sky. Framing the Pacific Ocean, sun-drenched palm trees open skyward toward the San Gabriel Mountains. The silhouettes of buildings, sparkling with camera flashes that glow like diamonds, are illuminated by radiant searchlights in a picturesque design that celebrates stardom and style.  Shine through the city with RM, Jin, SUGA, j-hope, Jimin, V, and Jung Kook when you bring home the Premium BTS Logo: Los Angeles Edition today!
